description: Crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its leatherette upper and elegant metal hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. If you're looking for a bag with class and quality, you can expand your collection with this accessory. Height: 29cm Width: 46cm Depth: 11cm Leatherette upper for durability One main compartment with a zippered pocket, a zippered separator and a mobile pouch One long adjustable and removable handle Metallic brand badge on the front Buckle design on the either side Leatherette overlays looped through metallic buttons Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
